specs.title: lists org users with pipeline assignments
admin can update a user role
admin can reset a user password
can get pipeline assignments for a user
can assign pipelines to a user
after removing pipeline access, member cannot see leads in that pipeline
after adding pipeline, member can see pipeline data
POST /api/auth/login valid admin returns 200 with user data
POST /api/auth/login valid member returns 200 with redirect=/pipeline
POST /api/auth/login valid superadmin returns 200 with redirect=/manage
GET /api/auth/me as admin returns 200 with user, pipelines, org
POST /api/auth/logout invalidates session so subsequent /me returns 401
POST /api/auth/change-password with correct current password returns 200
POST /api/auth/change-password with wrong current password returns 400
POST /api/auth/change-password with short new password returns 400
